item.name: Br'aaxfish
item.description:
The fangs of these deadly predators rival the br'aax in terms of sheer prey-shredding power.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Equipped with a mouthful of razor-sharp fangs, this wavekin has an impressive, albeit terrifying, dedication to satiating its hunger. Not content to subsist on waterborne prey alone, it will attack and consume any mammal or bird that happens to fall into the water. Some believe these fish to be the resurrected spirits of the equally deadly br'aax.
